caveats: research-cache vectors embed post-publication reception (hindsight) -- accepted
leaky variant's correction saw future books -- labeled leaky, not a knowable-then number
3 rated books absent from Timeline are placed last by (year_read, title) per owner decision
interval_note: per-variant interval is the engine's +/-1.645*resid_sd, not the served conformal interval

leakage_inventory.author_genre_correction_pairs: neutralised in honest (pool), LEAKY in leaky (full library)
leakage_inventory.component_corrections_deltatracker: retired to zero AND unwired -- enters no variant
leakage_inventory.correlation_smoothing_models: neutralised in honest (pool), LEAKY in leaky (full library)
leakage_inventory.genre_and_component_weights: config, not learned from the book set -- no leakage
leakage_inventory.rank_over_library: neutralised in honest (pool); leaky ranks over full library
leakage_inventory.research_cache_vector: ACCEPTED hindsight caveat -- embeds post-publication reception
leakage_inventory.resid_sd_for_interval: neutralised in honest (pool), LEAKY in leaky (full library)

variants.honest: smooth + author_genre correction fit on PAST-ONLY pool (the walk-forward baseline)
variants.leaky: smooth + author_genre correction fit on FULL library (today's config; leaky)
variants.raw: research vector -> WA (no smoothing, no correction); pool-independent
